status_legend.achieved: Content of the 'Achieved' column — what was actually accomplished (a value or description)
status_legend.in_progress: Content of the 'In Progress' column — what is currently underway
status_legend.reasons_and_corrective_actions: Content of the 'Reasons for Non-Achievement and Corrective Actions' column — populated only when an item was not completed, including the reason and the corrective action taken
status_legend.timeframe: The date/period associated with the item
